nodes.label: AI for mundane, low-risk tasks
nodes.grounding_span: mundane and boring tasks that I prefer to delegate to LLMs

nodes.label: AI adherence to constraints and requirements
nodes.label_negative: AI deviation from constraints and requirements
nodes.grounding_span: the LLM does not always follow my constraints or meet all my requirements

nodes.label: AI as autonomous task completer
nodes.grounding_span: I would prefer if it could handle the entire task independently

nodes.label: AI accuracy and contextual relevance
nodes.grounding_span: it often gives incorrect information that is very different to the widely accepted protocols

nodes.label: AI as data analysis and insight generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for nuanced interpretation
nodes.grounding_span: It produced very good insights from the data given

nodes.label: AI integration in medical equipment and workflow
nodes.grounding_span: AI based reconstructions, dose optimisation and protocol selection/adaptation

nodes.label: Time efficiency and effort reduction
nodes.grounding_span: save time and essentially my own effort

nodes.label: Patient safety and clinical accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: high risk and a potential impact to patients

nodes.label: Professional competence and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: improve my AI skills and work with it rather against it

nodes.label: Improved patient outcomes and throughput
nodes.grounding_span: improving the throughput of patients and the diagnosis of patients

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for data analysis and business case
nodes.grounding_span: I was very satisfied when I gave AI data for a cannulation audit

nodes.label: Distrust of AI for clinical decision support
nodes.grounding_span: I would not use an LLM for decision support or clinical decision making

nodes.label: Openness and embrace of AI in work
nodes.grounding_span: I am very open to AI and embrace it even in areas that it could possibly take over

nodes.label: Preference for independent AI task completion
nodes.grounding_span: I would prefer if it could handle the entire task independently

nodes.label: Risk-based task delegation — distinguishes high-risk from low-risk tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For things that carry very little risk or implications, such as rotas and learning materials, I would delegate these tasks to AI

nodes.label: Proactive embrace of automation — welcomes AI integration into workflow
nodes.grounding_span: I am actually welcoming the opportunity to improve my AI skills and work with it rather against it
